---
name: Plugin submission
about: Share a plugin to be listed for the community
title: '[Plugin] '
labels: plugin
---

**Plugin name & id**
e.g. "Strobe" — `com.example.strobe`

**What does it integrate with?**
The gear/protocol/service it controls.

**Permissions requested**
Which of `network` / `devices` / `show-read` / `show-write` / `master`, and why.

**Source**
Link to the plugin's repo or hosted `.js` bundle. (Built with
[`@voxcomposer/plugin-sdk`](../../packages/plugin-sdk)?)

**Tested with**
Vox Composer version + any hardware you verified against.
